title: Jouri
description_plain:
A bright opening with playful contrast Pitaya brings a fruity and slightly unexpected freshness, lifted by the sparkle of orange and wrapped in the sweet indulgence of candied cherry. The effect is joyful with a fruity touch. At the heart, the composition softens into a floral bloom. Peony takes the lead, airy and luminous, giving the fragrance its feminine elegance. It blends seamlessly with the creamy warmth of frangipani, while raspberry adds a subtle fruity echo. Water Lily introduces a fresh and watery nuance. In the base, the scent becomes warmer and more comforting. Vanilla wraps the skin in a smooth, addictive sweetness, balanced by the depth of patchouli. A soft veil of tonka rounds the trail, leaving a feminine signature that feels easy to wear.
FRAGRANCE NOTES:
Top: Pitaya, Orange, Candied Cherry
Heart: Peony, Frangipani, Raspberry, Water Lily
Base: Vanilla, Tonka, Patchouli

This refined fragrance opens with a vibrant fusion of bergamot, saffron, and pink pepper, creating a fresh yet subtly spiced introduction that feels confident and modern. The opening is bright and energetic, setting the tone for a composition that balances freshness with depth.
At the heart, rose and jasmine unfold with smooth floral elegance, adding warmth and sophistication. Rose, Jasmine

Ra’ed Intensely opens with a vibrant blend of bergamot, grapefruit, and yuzu, delivering a crisp citrus introduction that feels fresh, bright, and full of energy. This sparkling opening sets a confident tone with a clean and modern character that instantly feels uplifting and refined.
At the heart, soft white florals merge with ambergris and a hint of black pepper, adding warmth and subtle spice for a smooth aromatic balance. The base settles into musk, sandalwood, and ambroxan, creating a polished woody finish that feels elegant, masculine, and effortlessly composed.

White Florals, Ambergris, Black Pepper

title: Habik for Men
base_notes: Sandalwood, Patchouli, Tonka Bean, Amberwood, Musk
description_plain:
Lattafa Habik for Men offers a striking scent experience, opening with the vibrant spice of cardamom and pepper, complemented by crisp bergamot and the distinct edge of artemisia. The fragrance transitions to a heart where soothing lavender and aromatic sage are enhanced by the inviting warmth of cinnamon. It concludes with a robust base of sandalwood, patchouli, tonka bean, amberwood, and musk, creating a rich and enduring masculine signature.
Top notes
: Cardamom, Pepper, Artemisia, Bergamot
Middle Notes
: Sage, Lavender, Cinnamon
Base Notes:
 Sandalwood, Patchouli, Tonka Bean, Amberwood, Musk

title: Fire On Ice
description_plain:
Lattafa Fire On Ice is a fragrance born from the tensioned balance of extremes. Black raspberry turned bold and boozy, rose petals frozen in heat, oakwood warm enough to ground it all. It’s the perfect moment where ice becomes flame and fire crystallizes. Freeze it. Burn it. Wear both.
Top Notes: Black Raspberry, Cinnamon, Cognac (Liquor)
Middle notes: Frozen Rose Petals, Caramel, Moss
Base Notes: Oakwood, Myrrh, Cedarwood, Ambroxan

description_plain:
Experience royal sophistication with Ameer Al Oudh by Lattafa Perfumes.
A rich, smoky, and woody oriental fragrance, Ameer Al Oudh is crafted for those who appreciate depth, tradition, and long-lasting elegance. This unisex Eau de Parfum opens with warm woody notes and sweet vanilla, instantly evoking luxury and comfort. As it settles, a rich heart of smoky oud and incense emerges, followed by a creamy, musky base that lingers on the skin for hours.

Middle Notes: Incense, Sugar, Musk

title: Raed Silver
description_plain:
Raed Silver by Lattafa Perfumes is a refined oriental spicy unisex fragrance that exudes warmth, sensuality, and modern sophistication. Launched in 2021, this captivating scent opens with a zesty splash of citruses, aromatic spices, and juicy mandarin orange — an energizing introduction that instantly draws attention. The heart of the fragrance unveils a rich fusion of cinnamon, amber, cloves, and saffron, evoking both fiery intensity and golden warmth. As it settles, the base reveals a deep and alluring blend of vanilla, musk, leather, ambergris, and oud, leaving a creamy, woody trail that’s both seductive and comforting.
Ideal for day-to-night wear, Ra’ed Silver is a statement of elegance and confidence for both men and women.
Top Notes: Citruses, Spices, Mandarin Orange
Middle Notes: Cinnamon, Amber, Cloves, Saffron
Base Notes: Vanilla, Musk, Leather, Ambergris, Agarwood (Oud)

title: Raed  Oud

Ra’ed Oud by Lattafa Perfumes is a bold and captivating unisex fragrance that blends oriental richness with modern elegance. Launched in 2021, this scent opens with a vibrant burst of saffron, bergamot, and lavender, creating a fresh yet spicy introduction. The heart reveals a mysterious and smoky blend of cypriol oil, incense, and delicate rose, evoking a sense of mystique and depth. As it dries down, Ra’ed Oud unveils its warm, woody base of leather, oud, sandalwood, and amber — leaving a lasting, luxurious trail that lingers with power and sophistication.
Perfect for those who seek a signature scent that commands attention and leaves a memorable impression.

title: Qaed Al Fursan Unlimited
heart_notes: Jasmine, Patchouli, Rose, Floral and Woody
base_notes: Ambergris, Vanilla, Oakmoss and Rich Musk
description_plain:
Lattafa Qaed Al Fursan Unlimited cologne is a citrus unisex fragrance. Launched in 2022, the profile combines notes of citrus and flowers with a rich, powdery base of vanilla and musk the men and women alike can love. Fragrance Family is Citrus and Scent Type Sweet, powdery and tropical. Lattafa Qaed Al Fursan Unlimited cologne opens with refreshing coconut and pineapple. It blossoms in the middle with Jasmine, frangipani and ylang-ylang. The foundation settles on the skin with rich sandalwood, musk and vanilla. For a long-lasting fragrance that you can carry throughout the day and to minimize the need for reapplying, focus on your pulse points behind your ears, at the base of your neck and on your wrists as well as warmer areas of the body, such as behind the knees and inside the elbow. These are the best places to apply your Lattafa fragrance since the scent intensifies by the warmth of your body.
Top Notes
: Bergamot, Raspberry, Apple, Black birch
Middle Notes
: Jasmine, Patchouli, Rose, Floral and Woody
Base Notes: 
Ambergris, Vanilla, Oakmoss and Rich Musk

title: Petra
description_plain:
Inspired by the Greek word 'πέτρα' (pronounced 'petra'), meaning 'stone' or 'rock', Petra by Lattafa is more than just a fragrance — it’s a transformation. Inspired by the laid-back luxury of the Mediterranean, Petra captures that fleeting moment of summer at its peak and petrafies it. The result is a scent that freezes warmth, florals, and memories into something eternal. As the scent unfolds, the delicate floral pattern begins its quiet conquest, petrafying each ingredient in place like nature turned to art. You are not just wearing a fragrance; you are being transformed by it—softly, completely, forever. Get petrafied in a Mediterranean summer.
Top Notes
Plum, Rum
Middle Notes
Tuberose, Coconut
Base Notes
Praline, Musk, Vanilla

title: Kashan
description_plain:
Lattafa Pride Natural Oud Eau de Parfum is a captivating fragrance that blends exotic spices and rich woods, creating a scent of opulence and mystery. It opens with an intriguing combination of saffron, juicy red fruits, and warm nutmeg, instantly drawing you in with its spicy-sweet allure. The heart of the fragrance unfolds with the romantic and timeless floral notes of rose and jasmine, adding a layer of elegance and depth. In the base, the powerful presence of oud is softened by the earthiness of cedar wood, enriched by the resinous warmth of benzoin and amber, leaving a luxurious, long-lasting trail.
Top Notes
Pepper, Orange, Clary Sage
Middle Notes
Cashmeran, Raspberry, Ambroxan
Base Notes
Sandalwood, Vetiver, Musk

Breeze is a perfume that captures the essence of serenity and contemplation. It combines the bright freshness of bergamot, the meditative quality of incense, the spiciness of cardamom, and the soothing embrace of musk and sandalwood to create a scent that is both calming and intriguing. It is a fragrance that invites you to pause, breathe deeply, and savor the beauty of the moment. Breeze is a perfect choice for those who seek a fragrance that embodies the tranquility and elegance of life's simple pleasures.

Top Notes
Bergamot, Incense, Cardamom

Middle Notes

Base Notes

title: Embrace
heart_notes: , which introduce a sense of depth and complexity
description_plain: Embrace Perfume by Lattafa Pride is an enticing composition that embraces the wearer in a sophisticated and aromatic embrace. Its interplay of citrus, spices, woods, and resins creates a fragrance that is both intriguing and comforting, making it a perfect choice for individuals who appreciate complexity and elegance in their perfumes. The perfume begins with an invigorating burst of top notes. Bergamot, known for its fresh and citrusy aroma, lends a bright and uplifting quality to the composition. Ginger adds a spicy and slightly sweet kick, while armoise (wormwood) contributes a herbal and aromatic facet. As the fragrance unfolds, it reveals its heart notes, which introduce a sense of depth and complexity. Patchouli, a rich and earthy note, takes centre stage, providing a warm and grounding character to the scent. Fir balsam brings a forest-like, resinous quality, evoking the serenity of nature. Incense adds an intriguing smokiness and a touch of spirituality to the blend. In the base, Embrace Perfume develops into a harmonious and lasting drydown. Ambergris offers a subtle marine and animalic note, enhancing the fragrance’s depth. Benzoin, with its sweet and resinous aroma, contributes a warm and comforting aspect. Oakmoss, known for its earthy and green scent, adds a classic and sophisticated touch to the composition.

description_html:
Lattafa Pride Brioche Vanille Eau de Parfum is an exquisite blend of gourmand sweetness and floral elegance. The fragrance opens with the bright citrus of bergamot, harmonized by the soft, airy floral touch of freesia and a delectable brioche accord that evokes the comforting scent of freshly baked pastries. As it transitions, the heart notes introduce the powdery, almond-like heliotrope and the rich, resinous warmth of fir balsam, creating a cozy, yet refined feel. The base is a decadent mix of sweet vanilla, creamy praline, and the smooth, amber-like depth of benzoin, leaving a lasting, indulgent impression.

Top Notes
Brioche, Bergamot, Freesia

Middle Notes
Balsam Fir, Heliotrope

Base Notes
Vanilla, Benzoin, Praline

title: Yara Moi
description_plain:
Lattafa Yara Moi is a mesmerizing blend of elegance and sensuality, crafted for those who leave a lasting impression. The fragrance opens with the luscious sweetness of Pear, the vibrant sparkle of Pink Pepper, and the juicy richness of Black Currant, creating an irresistibly fresh and playful introduction. At its heart, the creamy opulence of Tuberose and Jasmine intertwines with the delicate warmth of Almond, adding depth and sophistication.
As it lingers, the scent melts into a luxurious base of Vanilla, the velvety smoothness of Cashmeran, and the earthy allure of Patchouli, leaving a soft yet captivating trail. Yara Moi is the perfect scent for those who embrace their femininity with grace, confidence, and undeniable charm.
Top Notes
Pear, Pink Pepper, Black Current
Middle Notes
Tubercose,Jasmine, Almond
Base Notes
Vanilla, Cashmeran,Patchouli

top_notes: Kiwi, Red Currant, Rhubarb, Pink Pepper
description_plain:
Tamima by Lattafa Eau de Parfum is a fruity fragrance, a real ode to escape and the lightness of summer. It embodies freedom of spirit and the pleasure of savoring the present moment. If you like adventure, let yourself be carried away by this summery and light fragrance.
This summer fragrance reveals all the freshness of a tasty cocktail of forest fruits and strawberries sprinkled with a touch of melting raspberry and the acidity of blackcurrant. Red berries give way to fleshy peach notes, perfectly complimented by floral scents of violet, orange blossom and vanilla.

Kiwi, Red Currant, Rhubarb, Pink Pepper
Middle Notes
Watermelon, Cyclamen, Jasmine
Base Notes
Musk, Cedar, Sandalwood, Woodsy Notes

title: Qaed Al Fursan Untamed
description_plain:
Lattafa Qaed Al Fursan Untamed is a bold and daring fragrance that commands attention from the very first spray. It opens with a warm and spicy blend of nutmeg, cardamom, mandarin, and cinnamon, creating a dynamic and invigorating introduction.
The heart unfolds with aromatic lavender, geranium, cypress, and clary sage, layered with a touch of sweet caramel for unexpected richness. As it settles, the scent reveals a deep and resinous base of cedarwood, olibanum, vetiver, labdanum, and amber, leaving a powerful and captivating trail. Untamed is the perfect expression of confidence and strength for those who live boldly and without limits.
Top Notes
Coconut, Citruses, Pineapple
Middle Notes
Ylang-Ylang, Frangipani, Jasmine
Base Notes
Vanilla, Musk, Sandalwood, Sweet Notes

title: Peace & Love
description_plain:
Lattafa Pride Peace & Love by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Fruity Floral fragrance that brings together serenity and elegance. It starts with the fresh and uplifting scent of bergamot, mixed with the comforting warmth of almond and the subtle sweetness of blackcurrant.
At its heart, you'll find a gentle blend of rose and tuberose, adding a touch of grace and refinement. The fragrance is rounded off with a base of creamy sandalwood, soft heliotrope, and soothing vanilla, leaving a smooth and comforting finish. Lattafa Pride Peace & Love is a timeless choice, perfect for anyone looking to add a bit of calm and sophistication to their day.
Top Notes
Bergamot, Almond, Blackcurrant
Middle Notes
Rose, Tuberose
Base Notes
Sandalwood, Heliotrope, Vanilla

title: Art Of Arabia I
heart_notes: , where a symphony of unique and intriguing accords awaits
description_plain:
The fragrance opens with a bright and zesty burst of bergamot, a citrus note known for its fresh and invigorating qualities. Paired with the incredible, crisp scent of mint, this initial impression is refreshing and uplifting, setting the stage for the journey ahead. As the fragrance evolves, it transitions into its heart notes, where a symphony of unique and intriguing accords awaits. With its deep and fragrant profile, black tea takes centre stage, creating an aura of warmth and sophistication. Ginger adds a spicy and slightly piquant character, while lavender introduces a touch of herbal freshness. In the base, Art Of Arabia I Perfume reveals its depth and complexity. Ambroxan, a synthetic note reminiscent of ambergris, contributes a musky and sweet facet, enhancing the fragrance’s longevity and overall sensuality. Olibanum, also known as frankincense, lends a resinous and spiritual quality to the composition, evoking the essence of Arabian culture. With its warm and spicy aroma, Cinnamon adds a final layer of depth and allure. Art Of Arabia I Perfume is a unisex fragrance that transcends gender boundaries. Its multifaceted and intriguing blend of notes makes it suitable for those who appreciate the complexity of their scents. Whether worn during the day or in the evening, this fragrance exudes an air of elegance and refinement. In summary, Art Of Arabia I Perfume pays homage to the beauty and mystique of Arabian traditions. Its harmonious fusion of citrus, tea, spices, and resins creates a captivating and memorable fragrance that celebrates the artistry and allure of Arabia.
Top Notes
Bergamot, Mint
Middle Notes
Black Tea, Ginger, Lavender
Base Notes
Ambroxan, Frankincense, Cinnamon

description_plain:
Perfume Oud Mood Reminiscence Eau de Parfum by Lattafa Perfumes is a slightly fresh, oriental fragrance with citrus accents, woody and spicy notes. The top note is pleasantly fresh and fruity with raspberries, oranges and saffron. Amber, bay leaves, geraniums, camomile, lavender, cardamom, caramel and nutmeg follow in the heart note and are replaced by sandalwood, cedarwood, oakmoss, resins, vetiver, oud, vanilla and musk in the base. A noble oriental perfume with a fine freshness and spiciness.

title: Mashrabya
description_plain:
From the house of Lattafa comes Mashrabya, a unisex fragrance that effortlessly blends modern sophistication with timeless tradition. It opens with the vibrant allure of apple shisha accord and a spicy hint of pink pepper, setting a bold yet inviting tone.
At its heart, warm cinnamon, luscious dates, and smoky tobacco create a rich and opulent core. The journey concludes with the indulgent sweetness of vanilla and caramel, balanced by the earthy depth of patchouli, leaving a luxurious and unforgettable impression for all who wear it.
Top Notes
Apple Shisha Accord, Pink Pepper
Middle Notes
Tobacco, Cinnamon, Dates
Base Notes
Oud Smoke, Caramel, Vanilla, Patchouli

tags: New, spo-cs-disabled, spo-default, spo-disabled, spo-notify-me-disabled, Trending
description_plain:
Dukhan, meaning "smoke," is deeply rooted in Middle Eastern heritage and the ritual of burning perfume. Ethereal and hypnotic, Khamrah Dukhan captures the allure of rising smoke with its mesmerizing movement, sophisticated depth, and complex sillage. It transforms tradition into a modern olfactive statement of power and allure.
The burning composition of pimento, tobacco, and amber creates a fragrance that exudes raw energy, boldness, and addictive allure. While Khamrah Dukhan remains a unisex fragrance, this edition takes on a masculine angle, embracing the strength and intensity that resonate with masculinity.
Top Notes
Spices, Pimento, Mandarin
Middle Notes
Incense, Labdanum, Orange Blossom, Patchouli
Base Notes
Tobacco, Praline, Amber, Tonka Bean, Benzoin

description_plain:
Lattafa Khamrah Luxurious oriental-spicy unisex fragrance Lattafa Khamrah combines priceless spices with the coziness of woody notes and the sweetness of vanilla. The fragrance is sold in an opulent crystal container and is produced by the Arab luxury fragrance company Lattafa Perfumes. The dominant note of Khamrah is bergamot's zesty freshness, surrounded by cinnamon's warm, velvety spice and refined sage.
The base of Lattafa Khamrah, on the other hand, offers a rich perfume that combines the sensuous delicacy of vanilla with spicy valuable woods, sweet smoky oud, smoky fragrant myrrh, spicy tonka bean, and vanilla resinous benzoin, shimmering softly in the rays. upscale amber.

Khamrah Air freshener 300ML.

Cinnamon, Nutmeg, Bergamot

Dates, Praline, Tuberose, Mahonial

Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Amberwood, Myrrh, Benzoin, Akigalawood

description_plain:
Lattafa His Confession Eau De Parfum Spray for Men is a bold and captivating fragrance that embodies modern masculinity. It opens with a refreshing and spicy blend of mandarin, cinnamon, and lavender, creating an invigorating introduction that immediately commands attention. As the fragrance develops, it reveals a rich heart of iris, cypress, and benzoin, adding depth and sophistication.

His Confession combines freshness with warmth, making it versatile for any occasion, whether day or night. This fragrance is the perfect choice for men who seek to exude confidence, elegance, and a touch of mystery, ensuring they make a statement wherever they go.

heart_notes: unveil a beautiful floral bouquet, featuring the timeless elegance of rose, the delicate charm of peony, and the graceful allure of magnolia
description_plain:
Ajwad Pink to Pink by Lattafa Perfumes is a captivating new fragrance for both women and men, launched in 2024. This enchanting scent opens with a lively and refreshing blend of guava, pink grapefruit, lychee, and pink pepper, creating a vibrant and succulent introduction.
As the fragrance develops, the heart notes unveil a beautiful floral bouquet, featuring the timeless elegance of rose, the delicate charm of peony, and the graceful allure of magnolia. In the base, rich and warm notes of leather, musk, ambergris, vanilla, and moss come together, providing a sensual and enduring finish. Ajwad Pink to Pink is a harmonious composition that leaves a lasting impression of sophistication and allure.

Guava, Pink Grapefruit, Litchi, Pink Pepper

Rose, Peony, Magnolia
Base Notes

title: Afeef
description_plain:
Lattafa Afeef Eau de Parfum is a versatile fragrance crafted for everyone, delivering a harmonious blend of fresh, floral, and warm notes in a 3.4 oz / 100 ml spray. It opens with an invigorating burst of bergamot, accented by the subtle spice of pink pepper and a touch of juicy peach.
At its heart, an enchanting bouquet of jasmine, orange flower, and tuberose adds depth and floral elegance. The fragrance settles into a warm, inviting base of sandalwood, amber, praline, and patchouli, leaving a memorable, sophisticated trail suitable for any occasion.
